visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a product box for a dinosaur toy at a Costco warehouse. A person's hand points to a fossil-shaped remote control diagram on the back of the green packaging. The lighting is bright and industrial, characteristic of a large retail store. (2) The camera pans upward to show a price sign hanging from the ceiling, displaying '$699' and the product name 'AOSGA DINO'. The background reveals the vast, open ceiling structure and high shelves of the warehouse. (3) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink blouse and a black vest, appears in frame holding the dinosaur toy box. She smiles broadly and gestures toward the toy, looking directly at the camera with high energy. (4) Close-up shots focus on specific features printed on the box, including icons for 'SPRAY', 'SOUND', and '360°' rotation. The woman's hands are seen pointing at the colorful illustrations of different dinosaur color variants. (5) The woman continues to hold the box while standing in an aisle filled with stacked cardboard boxes of the same product. A small bubble overlay briefly appears showing a white dog. (6) The camera focuses on the side of the box, showing wheels on the dinosaur's feet and text indicating 'FAST SPEED'. The woman concludes the sequence by laughing and interacting with the box against the warehouse background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 妹妹說他想要. (2) [Subtitle]: 這是他遙控器帥爆了. (3) [Subtitle]: 他遙控器是他的化石欸帥爆了. (4) [Subtitle]: 699買到一個歡樂的小孩. (5) [Subtitle]: 噴霧遙控跳舞恐龍. (6) [Subtitle]: 699元. (7) [Subtitle]: 好啦給你買一個 因為我覺得很酷. (8) [Subtitle]: 哇好可愛啊. (9) [Subtitle]: 但是他看起來很憤怒欸 你願意這個花色嗎. (10) [Subtitle]: 對啊 我想要淺色. (11) [Subtitle]: 藍色我們等到029有上市. (12) [Subtitle]: 哈哈哈哈 699元. (13) [Subtitle]: 他是既會動又會噴水. (14) [Subtitle]: Wow 還有聲音. (15) [Subtitle]: 他還會旋轉. (16) [Subtitle]: 阿龍一定會氣炸. (17) [Subtitle]: 好可愛呀. (18) [Subtitle]: 還會旋轉. (19) [Subtitle]: 哇360度哦. (20) [Subtitle]: 他還會這樣憤怒的張耳朵. (21) [Subtitle]: 哇. (22) [Subtitle]: 然後他下面是這個輪子 所以走很順. (23) [Subtitle]: 他跑很快. (24) [Subtitle]: 買給你的小孩. (25) [Subtitle]: 普遍級就是1-99歲. (26) [Subtitle]: 好OK 99歲的拿去放吧.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main female creator presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a light pink puffy-sleeved blouse under a black sleeveless vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse interior featuring high ceilings with metal rafters, bright industrial lighting, and large industrial shelves stacked with brown cardboard product boxes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice narrating in Mandarin over a bright, high-tempo electronic BGM. A faint industrial hum from the store environment is present. (2) A sharp 'ding' SFX punctuates the transition as the camera moves to the price tag. The BGM remains steady with a strong percussive beat. (3) The female speaker's arousal increases, accompanied by laughter and a secondary male voice providing short affirmations. (4) Multiple 'pop' and 'whoosh' SFX are layered over the speech to emphasize the toy's features being discussed. (5) The mix concludes with the female voice reaching a high melodic peak, laughing as she finishes her recommendation, with the BGM fading out quickly after a hard cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature Inventory -> Social Proof -> Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and recommend a specific remote-controlled dinosaur toy found at Costco, highlighting its features (mist, sound, movement) and price point to an audience interested in shopping finds or children's gifts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While product-focused, the casual vlog style and 'shopping at Costco' context suggest a personal recommendation rather than a paid partnership.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density use of on-screen text and fast-paced editing typical of social media short-form video trends. The audio-visual synchronization of SFX with camera movements enhances the energetic tone.
